allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(o['owner']['id'], o['owner']['name'], o['owner']['type']\) for o in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dep=d[0]['deploy']; print\(json.dumps\(dep, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Set', len\(d\), 'env vars OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Deploy triggered:', d.get\('id'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dep=d[0]['deploy']; print\(dep['status'], '|', dep['id']\)")
